module_info.docstring:
Check interbench eval coverage against tldrs manifest.

Reads the tldrs manifest from stdin and checks 4 interbench files for gaps.
Exit 0 if everything is covered, exit 1 if gaps are found.

Usage:
    tldrs manifest | python3 scripts/check_tldrs_sync.py
    tldrs manifest | python3 scripts/check_tldrs_sync.py --quiet

functions.name: check_regression_suite
functions.docstring:
Check that regression_suite.json covers all (command, format) pairs,
boolean flags, and zoom levels.

functions.name: check_ab_formats
functions.docstring: Check that ab_formats.py DEFAULT_FORMATS covers all context-command formats.

functions.name: check_demo_script
functions.docstring: Check that demo-tldrs.sh covers every format at least once.

functions.name: check_score_tokens
functions.docstring: Check that score_tokens.py has parse_* functions for scoring hints with metrics.
